translation.en: His Word
translation.zu: Izwi Lakhe

translation.en: A beautifully fast, offline-first Bible companion built for distraction-free reading, deep study, and absolute privacy.
translation.zu: Umngane weBhayibheli osheshayo ngendlela enhle, ongaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi owakhelwe ukufunda okungenaphazamiso, ukutadisha okujulile, kanye nobumfihlo obuphelele.

translation.en: "In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God." — John 1:1
translation.zu: "Ekuqaleni kwakukhona uLizwi, uLizwi wayekuye uNkulunkulu, uLizwi wayenguNkulunkulu." — Johane 1:1

translation.en: Inspired by this prologue, His Word is built to celebrate scripture as the living Word of God. The app's original concept was titled Izwi Lakhe (isiZulu for "His Word"), but due to copyright restrictions regarding Zulu Bible translations, the companion is currently available in English only.
translation.zu: Uphefumulelwe yilesi singeniso, i-His Word yakhelwe ukubungaza umbhalo ongcwele njengezwi eliphilayo likaNkulunkulu. Umqondo wokuqala walolu hlelo lokusebenza wawunesihloko esithi Izwi Lakhe, kodwa ngenxa yemikhawulo ye-copyright mayelana nokuhunyushwa kweBhayibheli lesiZulu, umngane okwamanje itholakala ngesiNgisi kuphela.

translation.en: How It Works
translation.zu: Ukusebenza Kwayo

translation.en: 1. Fast, Offline Reading
translation.zu: 1. Ukufunda Okusheshayo Ngaphandle kwe-Inthanethi

translation.en: His Word stores Bible translations (ASV and WEB) locally on your device. Toggle between translations instantly, check your reading history, and resume exactly where you left off with spring-animated controls.
translation.zu: I-His Word igcina izinguqulo zeBhayibheli (ASV ne-WEB) endaweni kudivayisi yakho. Shintsha phakathi kwezinguqulo ngokushesha, hlola umlando wakho wokufunda, futhi uqhubeke lapho ugcine khona ngezilawuli ezinezithombe.

translation.en: 2. Study, Highlight & Journal
translation.zu: 2. Funda, Gqamisa & Bhala phansi

translation.en: Long-press verses to highlight using custom theme-adaptive palettes. Author rich-text reflection entries directly inside the chapter reader to record your study notes.
translation.zu: Cindezela isikhathi eside amavesi ukuze uwagqamise usebenzisa amaphalethi ahambisana netimu. Bhala okufundile ngqo ngaphakathi komfundi wesahluko ukuze ugcine amanothi akho okutadisha.

translation.en: 3. Asynchronous Deep Search
translation.zu: 3. Ukusesha Okujulile Okujwayelekile

translation.en: Search across all 66 books instantly. The search engine uses smart micro-task chunking to parse keywords over thousands of verses without blocking the UI thread, highlighting search keywords dynamically.
translation.zu: Sesha kuzo zonke izincwadi ezingama-66 ngokushesha. Injini yosesho isebenzisa ukwahlukanisa ukuhlunga amagama angukhiye emavesini ayizinkulungwane ngaphandle kokuvimba i-UI.

translation.en: 4. Tactile Shake & Share
translation.zu: 4. Nyakazisa & Wabelane

translation.en: Export your journal entries or highlighted scriptures as beautiful high-res cards rendered on-device using a local canvas. Simply shake your device to capture and share content with haptic vibration confirmation.
translation.zu: Thumela okubhalile noma amavesi agqanyisiwe njengamakhadi amahle e-high-res akhiqizwa kudivayisi isebenzisa i-canvas yasendaweni. Nyakazisa idivayisi yakho ukuze uthwebule futhi wabelane ngokuqukethwe ngesikhumbuzi sokudlidliza.

translation.en: Under the Hood
translation.zu: Ngaphansi Kwendwangu

translation.en: LRU Database Cache
translation.zu: I-LRU Database Cache

translation.en: Custom Least Recently Used cache system that keeps memory footprint minimal by loading book modules dynamically and caching only active books.
translation.zu: Isistimu yenqolobane ye-Least Recently Used (LRU) egcina inkumbulo incane ngokulayisha amamojula ezincwadi ngendlela eguquguqukayo nangokugcina izincwadi ezisebenzayo kuphela.

translation.en: Multi-Theme Engine
translation.zu: Injini Yezinhlobonhlobo Zezihloko

translation.en: Built using Uniwind and custom Metro configurations. Instantly switches system accent variables across 4 premium color palettes (Green, Pink, Blue, Charcoal).
translation.zu: Yakhiwe isebenzisa i-Uniwind nokucushwa kwe-Metro. Ishintsha ngokushesha okuguquguqukayo kwesistimu phakathi kwamaphalethi emibala we-premium ama-4 (Eliluhlaza, Eliphinki, Eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, Namalahle).

translation.en: Local JSON / Storage
translation.zu: I-Local JSON / Isitore

translation.en: All metrics, reflections, historical reading records, bookmarks, and preferences are saved locally on-device. Zero cloud database latency or tracking.
translation.zu: Yonke imikhombandlela, okubhalile, amarekhodi wokufunda omlando, amabhukumaka, nezintandokazi kulondolozwa endaweni kudivayisi. Ukubambezeleka kwedatha yefu enguziro noma ukulandelela.

translation.en: Canvas Share Engine
translation.zu: Injini Yokwabelana ye-Canvas

translation.en: Uses a localized off-screen WebView to dynamically compose and render typography into a high-res PNG image, which feeds directly into native sharing hooks.
translation.zu: Isebenzisa i-WebView yasendaweni engaphandle kwesikrini ukuze ibhale ngokuguquguqukayo futhi inikeze i-typography esithombeni se-PNG esiphezulu, esondla ngqo kumahuku okwabelana omndabu.
